details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all core requirements. The Zig INIObject.zig file is properly structured with create, parse, and stringify functions. The parse function correctly handles sections with dotted notation, key=value pairs, and both ; and # comments. Value coercion properly handles booleans (case-insensitive), null, numbers, quoted strings, and inline comments. Stringify correctly serializes objects to INI format with sections. Integration is complete: BunObject.zig wiring with lazy property callback, C++ exports header macro added, C++ hash table entry configured, and comprehensive TypeScript definitions with documentation and examples. The parser is self-contained using only std, bun, and jsc imports. Comprehensive test coverage (260+ lines) validates all major features including roundtrip conversion. Only minor issue: PLAN.md file exists but is empty (documentation artifact, not affecting functionality). Code follows Zig conventions throughout.
